title: Suicide Prevention Hotlines * Transgender Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > Suicide Prevention Hotlines * Transgender Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Older Adults Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF TRANS LIFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a volunteer-run hotline that offers crisis support and connection to resources where possible such as passport and state identification help to reflect gender identity. While the goal is to prevent self-harm, it is also a warmline where people can call with a variety of needs (i.e., how to access transition-related health care, where to find local support groups). The hotline is staffed by trans-identifying individuals. Operators will only call emergency services with the caller's consent. 548 Market Street Pmb 15337 San Francisco, CA 941045401 Eligibility: Any trans-identifying person and anyone who may be questioning their gender identity Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm; closed some holidays Email (877) 565-8860 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
